reasoning: Multiple credible sources published well after the resolution date of July 1, 2025 confirm that Libya has not ratified the AfCFTA. A February 2026 report from the US International Trade Administration (trade.gov) explicitly states that as of December 2025, 'Benin, Libya, South Sudan, and Sudan still have not ratified it'. Similarly, an update from the highly regarded TRALAC (Trade Law Centre) from January 2026 lists Libya among the very few countries yet to ratify. Because the July 1, 2025 deadline has already elapsed and authoritative post-deadline sources consistently agree that ratification did not occur, the probability of this event occurring is effectively zero.
